---
title: "GSM - AE Distribution Report"
subtitle: "Generated with the Good Statistical Monitoring {gsm} package"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: scroll
    css: 
      - styles.css
params:
  snapshot: NA
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(gsm)
library(DT)
library(gt)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(glue)
library(htmltools)
devtools::load_all()
```

```{r}
## Create data --------------------------------------------------------
study_comp <- Covariate_Map(dfCovariate = params$snapshot$lStudyAssessResults$kri0006$lData$dfSTUDCOMP,
              strCovariateColName = "compreas", 
              strWorkflowId = "kri0006"
              )
 
treat_comp <- Covariate_Map(dfCovariate = params$snapshot$lStudyAssessResults$kri0007$lData$dfSDRGCOMP,
              strCovariateColName = "sdrgreas", 
              strWorkflowId = "kri0007"
              )

study_comp_charts <- Covariate_Chart(study_comp)

treat_comp_charts <- Covariate_Chart(treat_comp)

raw_data_study <- snapshot$lStudyAssessResults$kri0006$lData$dfSTUDCOMP %>%
  select(
    "Study ID" = studyid,
    "Site ID" = siteid,
    "Subject ID" = subjid,
    "Metric" = compreas
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.empty(Metric)) %>%
  group_by(`Study ID`, Metric) %>%
  mutate("Total" = n_distinct(`Subject ID`)) %>% 
  group_by(`Site ID`) %>%
  mutate("Total Site" = n()) %>%
  group_by(`Site ID`, `Total Site`, Metric) %>%
  mutate("Total Metric" = n_distinct(`Subject ID`)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(`Study %` = round(`Total`/n_distinct(`Subject ID`) * 100, digits = 2),
         `Site %` = round(`Total Metric`/`Total Site` * 100, digits = 2))

raw_data_treat <- snapshot$lStudyAssessResults$kri0007$lData$dfSDRGCOMP %>%
  select(
    "Study ID" = studyid,
    "Site ID" = siteid,
    "Subject ID" = subjid,
    "Metric" = sdrgreas
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.empty(Metric)) %>%
  group_by(`Study ID`, Metric) %>%
  mutate("Total" = n_distinct(`Subject ID`)) %>% 
  group_by(`Site ID`) %>%
  mutate("Total Site" = n()) %>%
  group_by(`Site ID`, `Total Site`, Metric) %>%
  mutate("Total Metric" = n_distinct(`Subject ID`)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(`Study %` = round(`Total`/n_distinct(`Subject ID`) * 100, digits = 2),
         `Site %` = round(`Total Metric`/`Total Site` * 100, digits = 2))

```

Study Discontinuation
================================================================

Sidebar {.sidebar}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
# Study
h4(strong("Study:"))
cat(unique(study_comp$kri0006$study$`Study ID`))

# snapshot
h4(strong("Snapshot Date:"))
cat(as.character(params$snapshot$lSnapshotDate))

```

Scatter Plot {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Study-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

### <font size=3px>**Scatter Plot**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0006$scatterJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Metric)**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0006$barMetricJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Score)**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0006$barScoreJS
```

Bar Plot Study {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Study-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

```{r}
fig_bar_study <- round(length(unique(study_comp$kri0006$study$Metric))/1.75)
fig_bar_site <- round(length(unique(study_comp$kri0006$site$`Site ID`))/3)
```


### <font size=3px>**Number**</font> 
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
raw_data_study %>%
  plot_ly() %>%
  add_bars(x = ~Total, y = ~reorder(Metric, Total)) %>%
  add_bars(
  x = ~`Total Metric`,
  y = ~Metric,
  transforms = list(
    list(
      type = 'filter',
      target = ~`Site ID`,
      operation = '=',
      value = unique(raw_data$`Site ID`)[1]
    )
  )) %>% layout(
    showlegend = F,
    barmode = "overlay",
    updatemenus = add_dropdown(unique(raw_data_study$`Site ID`))
  )

```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r results='asis'}


```

Bar Plot Site {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Site-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
study_comp_charts$site_total
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
study_comp_charts$site_percent
```

Treatment Discontinuation
================================================================

Sidebar {.sidebar}
----------------------------------------------------------------
```{r results='asis'}
# Study
h4(strong("Study:"))
cat(unique(treat_comp$kri0007$study$`Study ID`))

# Snapshot
h4(strong("Snapshot Date:"))
cat(as.character(params$snapshot$lSnapshotDate))

```

Scatter Plot {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------

```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Treatment Discontinuation Rate by Site")
```

### <font size=3px>**Scatter Plot**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0007$scatterJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Metric)**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0007$barMetricJS
```

### <font size=3px>**Bar Plot (Score)**</font> 
```{r}
params$snapshot$lCharts$kri0007$barScoreJS
```

Bar Plot Study {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------

```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Study-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

```{r}
fig_bar_study <- round(length(unique(treat_comp$kri0007$study$Metric))/1.75)
fig_bar_site <- round(length(unique(treat_comp$kri0007$site$`Site ID`))/3)
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
raw_data_treat %>%
  plot_ly() %>%
  add_bars(x = ~Total, y = ~reorder(Metric, Total)) %>%
  add_bars(
  x = ~`Total Metric`,
  y = ~Metric,
  transforms = list(
    list(
      type = 'filter',
      target = ~`Site ID`,
      operation = '=',
      value = unique(raw_data$`Site ID`)[1]
    )
  )) %>% layout(
    showlegend = F,
    barmode = "overlay",
    updatemenus = add_dropdown(unique(raw_data_treat$`Site ID`))
  )

```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_study} }
treat_comp_charts$study_percent
```

Bar Plot Site {.tabset .tabset-fade}
----------------------------------------------------------------

```{r results='asis'}
tab_title("Site-wide Discontinuation Reasons")
```

### <font size=3px>**Number**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
treat_comp_charts$site_total
```

### <font size=3px>**Percent**</font>
```{r fig.height={fig_bar_site} }
treat_comp_charts$site_percent
```
